title: Fix Dingli JCPT0607A Fault Code 58: Pothole Protection | ChinaLiftSupply
content_summary: Dingli JCPT0607A Fault Code 58: Pothole protection device activated — uneven surface detected. Symptoms: machine stops moving, alarm sounds. Cause: pothole guard sensor triggered by uneven ground or sensor fault. Solution: (1) Move machine to level/flat ground. (2) Inspect pothole guards for physical damage or obstruction. (3) Check pothole guard sensor wiring and connections. (4) If on level ground and alarm persists, replace pothole guard sensor. Reset by cycling Emergency Stop button (push in then pull out).

title: Fix Dingli JCPT0607A Fault Code 20: General Alarm TM1 | ChinaLiftSupply
content_summary: Dingli JCPT0607A Fault Code 20: General Alarm TM1 — Traction Motor 1 controller fault, motor driver issue. Symptoms: drive function disabled, machine will not move. Cause: fault in traction motor 1 controller or motor driver electronics. Solution: (1) Check battery charge level — low voltage can trigger TM1 fault. (2) Inspect TM1 motor controller wiring harness and connectors for corrosion/damage. (3) Check motor phase wires. (4) If wiring is ok, TM1 controller may need replacement. Reset by cycling power (Emergency Stop).

title: Fix Dingli JCPT0607A Fault Code 69: Power Relay Sleep | ChinaLiftSupply
content_summary: Dingli JCPT0607A Fault Code 69: System entered sleep mode, power relay deactivated. Symptoms: machine unresponsive, no functions available. Cause: auto-sleep triggered by inactivity, low battery, or key switch issue. Solution: (1) Restart the machine by cycling key switch. (2) Check battery charge level — charge if low. (3) Verify key switch operation and wiring. (4) If unit repeatedly enters sleep mode, check for parasitic battery drain. Reset: push in and pull out the red Emergency Stop button.

title: Fix Dingli JCPT1912DC Fault Code 69: Power Relay Sleep | ChinaLiftSupply
content_summary: Dingli JCPT1912DC Fault Code 69: Power relay sleep mode activated. Same diagnostic approach as JCPT0607A code 69. Check battery charge, cycle key switch, verify key switch wiring. If persistent, investigate battery drain sources.

title: Error Indicator Readout - DINGLI JCPT0607DCS Operator's Manual Page 31 | ManualsLib
content_summary: Dingli JCPT0607DCS complete fault code list from operator manual. Codes include: 10 (General Alarm ECU), 20 (General Alarm TM1 — traction motor 1 fault), 30 (General Alarm PCU), 31 (PCU CPU0 Fault), 32 (PCU CPU1 Fault), 51 (ECU Alarm), 58 (Pothole protection activated), 69 (Power relay sleep), 110 (ECU Watchdog Fault), 111 (CANBUS Timeout 1 PCU CPU0), 112 (CANBUS Timeout 1 PCU CPU1). LED readout displays codes; reset by cycling Emergency Stop button. Full JCPT0607DCS operator manual available on ManualsLib.

title: Error Indicator Readout; List Of Fault Codes - DINGLI JCPT0307 Operators Manual Page 29 | ManualsLib
content_summary: Dingli JCPT0307 complete fault code list from operators manual, page 29. LED diagnostic readout displays error codes. General reset: push in and pull out red Emergency Stop button. Full manual available at ManualsLib for JCPT0307 model. Contains Error Indicator Readout section with list of fault codes and maintenance information.

title: Dingli JCPT1412DC / JCPT1612DC Self-Propelled Scissor Lifts Operator's Manual with Maintenance Information
content_summary: Official operator's manual for Dingli JCPT1412DC and JCPT1612DC self-propelled scissor lifts. Contains maintenance information, fault codes, error indicator readout, and troubleshooting procedures. PDF hosted by Advanced Access Platforms (UK). Includes specifications, safety instructions, and service procedures for these DC-powered scissor lift models.

title: Dingli JCPT0607DCM Official Parameter/Manual PDF | Dingliglobal.com
content_summary: Official Dingli parameter manual for JCPT0607DCM model scissor lift, hosted on dingliglobal.com (official Dingli global website). Contains technical specifications, fault codes, and troubleshooting procedures for the JCPT0607DCM variant. Primary source for this model's diagnostic information.

title: Dingli Scissor Lifts Product Manuals — Engine Electric | Dingliglobal.com
content_summary: Official Dingli global product manuals PDF for scissor lift range including engine-powered and electric models. Covers multiple JCPT models. Source: dingliglobal.com (official Dingli international website). Contains technical parameters, error codes, and general maintenance for the full Dingli scissor lift product line.

title: Dingli JCPT1418RT Operator's Manual with Maintenance Information | Advanced Access Platforms
content_summary: Operator's manual for Dingli JCPT1418RT rough terrain scissor lift. Contains fault codes, maintenance information, and troubleshooting procedures. PDF hosted by Advanced Access Platforms (UK distributor). Covers RT (Rough Terrain) variant with specific fault codes for 4WD drive system.

title: Fault Codes - JLG 450A Series II Service and Maintenance Manual Page 343 | ManualsLib
content_summary: JLG 450A/450AJ Series II complete fault code list, page 343 of service and maintenance manual. Contains DTC (Diagnostic Trouble Codes) for boom lift. Fault codes reference: prioritize by DTC group (highest first two digits first). General troubleshooting: check power/control wiring for shorts, inspect harness and connector pins. Common issues include angle sensor faults, hydraulic pressure sensor problems, tilt sensor malfunctions. For 2-speed not working, check tilt sensor. Cycle power via Emergency Stop to reset faults.

title: JLG 450AJ Service and Maintenance Manual PDF | Swift Equipment
content_summary: Complete JLG 450AJ service and maintenance manual PDF. Contains full fault code list, wiring diagrams, hydraulic system troubleshooting, and component replacement procedures. Covers 450AJ articulating boom lift service and repair procedures. Hosted by Swift Equipment Australia. Primary technical reference for JLG 450AJ diagnosis.

title: JLG Fault Codes, DTC Lookup Codes And Other Troubleshooting | JLG.com
content_summary: Official JLG knowledge base article about fault codes (DTCs) and troubleshooting. JLG offers analyzer readers (tethered cable, mobile, Bluetooth-enabled, remote ClearSky fleet management) to read fault codes. Searching over 1,500 articles by fault code or symptom provides: fault descriptions, possible causes, troubleshooting steps, special tools required, helpful documents. DTC prioritization: higher first-two-digit groups take priority. Reset faults by cycling Emergency Stop switch. JLG models covered include 450AJ, 520AJ, 860SJ and all JLG MEWPs.

title: JLG Boom Error Codes | Forklift PDF Manuals
content_summary: Comprehensive list of JLG boom lift error codes and diagnostic trouble codes (DTCs). Covers multiple JLG boom lift models including articulating and telescopic boom series. Contains error code descriptions, causes and recommended repair actions. Reference resource for JLG boom lift technicians.

title: JLG 450A/AJ Series II Service Manual Fault Codes Page 343 | ManualsDir
content_summary: JLG 450A/AJ Series II service manual fault codes section at page 343. Contains complete DTC list for 450AJ articulating boom lift. Same content as ManualsLib version. Fault code troubleshooting matrix with prioritization by DTC group number.

title: JLG Fault Codes — Complete Guide & What They Mean | EWP Spares Australia
content_summary: Complete guide to JLG fault codes for all JLG MEWPs including boom lifts and scissor lifts. Covers 860SJ, 520AJ, 450AJ and other models. JLG onboard diagnostic system monitors inputs/outputs across CAN bus control system. When fault detected, system logs DTC and restricts/shuts down operation. JLG Diagnostic Analyzer (part 1001249695) connects directly for real-time fault data, historical logs and system parameters. Categories: engine faults, sensor voltage, valve output, CAN communication, hydraulic pressure.

title: JLG Boom Lift Troubleshooting | Intella Parts
content_summary: JLG boom lift troubleshooting guide covering 450AJ, 520AJ, 860SJ and other models. Common faults: electrical connector corrosion (especially at harness connectors in front of platform and where cables enter boom), sensor failures, hydraulic valve issues. Tilt sensor malfunctions often block 2-speed function. Flash code reading via platform console light and ground control box indicator. Recommended tool: JLG handheld analyzer for detailed diagnostics.

title: Genie GS-3246 / GS-2646 / GS-2046 Service and Parts Manual (Part No. 48339) | Genie Official
content_summary: Official Genie service and parts manual for GS-3246, GS-2646, and GS-2046 scissor lifts. Part number 48339, First Edition Third Printing Rev C2. Contains complete fault code chart (after serial number 17407): Code 01, 02, 03, 12, 18 (pothole guard failure), 42 (forward coil error), 43 (reverse coil error), 45 (up coil error), 46 (down coil error), 47 (right coil error), 52, 53, 54 (left coil error), 55 (brake coil error), 56 (low voltage), 57, 58, 68. Fault codes found from page 182 onward. Full wiring diagrams, hydraulic schematics, and component replacement procedures included.

title: Genie Scissor Lift Error Codes: Complete Guide | 40+ Codes | Flat Earth Equipment
content_summary: Complete guide to 40+ Genie scissor lift error codes covering GS series models. Two types: DTC (Diagnostic Trouble Codes) generated by Genie SmartLink GSDS system for device/circuit malfunctions, and OIC (Operation Indicator Codes) for abnormal operating conditions. Common codes: E1 (Emergency Stop activated), E4 (Low Battery), E6 (Tilt Sensor fault), E12/E13 (Control Communication fault). OIC example: driving on non-level surface and attempting to raise triggers code. Systems monitored: hydraulic, battery/power, user interface, sensors/switches, controls.

title: Genie ECU Fault Codes GEN 5 | Hindley Electronics
content_summary: Genie ECU Generation 5 fault code reference PDF. Complete fault code list for GS series scissor lifts with Generation 5 controller. Applies to GS-1930, GS-1932, GS-2032, GS-2632, GS-2046, GS-2646, GS-3246. Contains fault descriptions, causes, and troubleshooting procedures for ECU-detected faults in the electrical and control systems.

title: Genie ECU Fault Codes GEN 6 | Hindley Electronics
content_summary: Genie ECU Generation 6 fault code reference PDF for newer GS series scissor lifts. Contains updated fault code list for Generation 6 controller-equipped machines. Fault codes, causes, and repair procedures for electrical and control system faults. Applicable to newer GS-1932, GS-3246 and related models with Gen 6 ECU.

title: Troubleshooting with Scissor Error Codes | Genie Official
content_summary: Official Genie scissor lift error code troubleshooting resource. Covers complete GS series fault diagnosis using Genie SmartLink Diagnostic System (GSDS). Two code types: DTC (circuit/device faults) and OIC (operator condition codes). Common codes: E1 Emergency Stop, E4 Low Battery, E6 Tilt Sensor, E12/E13 CAN bus communication. GS-1932 specific: prone to battery issues in cold weather. Applies to GS-1930/32, GS-2032, GS-2632, GS-2046/2646/3246 series.

title: Detect & Fix Genie Error Codes (Troubleshooting) | Biberger
content_summary: Genie scissor lift and boom lift error code detection and troubleshooting guide. Covers GS series (GS-1932, GS-3246) and boom series. Error codes explained with causes and solutions. Covers both Generation 5 and Generation 6 controller faults. Includes hydraulic and electrical fault diagnosis for Genie aerial work platforms.

title: Manitou Fault Codes and Solutions Guide | Scribd PDF
content_summary: Manitou fault codes list PDF document covering fault codes and solutions for Manitou equipment including telehandlers and aerial work platforms. Contains fault descriptions, potential causes (air leaks from schrader valves/o-rings, oil leaks from wiper seals/damper shafts, lack of travel from tight bushings/fluid levels), and repair solutions. Covers Manitou 180ATJ and related ATJ series models.

title: MANITOU Fault Codes DTC | Truck-Manuals.Net
content_summary: Manitou DTC (Diagnostic Trouble Codes) list for Manitou telehandlers and aerial work platforms. Complete fault code reference including codes for transmission, hydraulic, engine and electrical systems. Covers Manitou MT series and ATJ series including 180ATJ. Contains fault code descriptions and troubleshooting guidance.

title: Manitou Telehandlers: What To Do With Error Codes? | Machineseeker Blog
content_summary: Guide to handling Manitou telehandler and ATJ error codes. Covers diagnostic approach for Manitou equipment. Manitou diagnostic software (Manitou maintenance & diagnostic software) required for reading codes from ATJ models. Common fault categories: transmission faults, hydraulic pressure errors, engine management codes, electrical system faults. Manitou 180ATJ operator manuals available on ManualsLib (Manitou Systems 180 ATJ).

title: Manitou Systems 180 ATJ Manuals | ManualsLib
content_summary: Manitou Systems 180 ATJ aerial work platform manuals page on ManualsLib. Free PDF operator manual download available. Contains all official Manitou 180 ATJ documentation including operation instructions, safety requirements, maintenance schedules, and technical specifications. Primary reference for Manitou 180ATJ operators and technicians.

title: JLG 450AJ Series 1 (Ford Engine) Hydraulic Issues — Loss of Control to Valves | Forkliftaction Forum
content_summary: Forkliftaction.com forum discussion about JLG 450AJ Series 1 hydraulic valve control issues. Key diagnosis: check electrical connectors at harness in front of platform and where cables enter boom from tractor — connector terminal corrosion is common cause of intermittent/failed valve control. Flash codes visible on platform console light and ground control box indicator light. Tilt sensor faults block 2-speed function. JLG handset analyzer recommended for detailed diagnosis. Recommends checking all connector pins for corrosion before replacing components.

title: JLG 660SJ Error Code | Forkliftaction Forum
content_summary: Forkliftaction.com forum thread about JLG 660SJ error code diagnosis. Relevant for 860SJ troubleshooting as both are large telescopic boom lifts using similar control systems. Community-sourced diagnostic information, troubleshooting steps and solutions from field technicians.

title: Common Scissor Lift Problems and How to Fix Them | FieldEx
content_summary: General guide to common scissor lift problems and solutions across brands (JLG, Genie, Dingli, etc.). Key hydraulic issues: loss of lifting power, uneven lifting, platform failure to raise/lower, visible fluid leaks. Causes: worn seals/hoses, contaminated hydraulic fluid, low fluid levels, damaged cylinders/pumps. Solutions: check fluid levels, inspect hoses (main culprit), look for contamination. Battery/electrical: common in electric scissor lifts — check charge, connections, controller. Tilt sensor: common cause of drive/lift lockout. Check all hydraulic oil pipes, joints must be tight.

title: How to Prevent Hydraulic Failure in Aerial Lifts | YorkPMH
content_summary: Guide to preventing hydraulic failure in aerial work platforms (AWP). Key causes of hydraulic failures: contaminated fluid (air, water, particulates cause erratic movement and damage), worn seals, low fluid levels, damaged hoses. Prevention: regular fluid level checks, fluid contamination testing, hose inspection and replacement schedule, seal maintenance. Symptoms of hydraulic issues: sluggish/unresponsive movements, uneven lifting, platform drift, visible leaks. Applicable to all AWP brands including JLG, Genie, Dingli scissor lifts and boom lifts.
